context_selection: Explicit reviewer contract, documentation manifest, and exact UTF-8 contents of all 18 declared customer files.
rejected_response_shapes: A shell-transport pass changed the exact recovery category file list and introduced an unsupported privacy-law compliance phrase.
rejected_results: The interrupted predecessor run exhausted local memory before returning review evidence.
A direct CLI response was rejected because its recovery category did not match the exact requested file list and its privacy narrative outran the documents.
A second CLI response was rejected after the shell transport converted valid UTF-8 em dashes into question marks and produced two false findings contradicted by direct file inspection.
final_transport: Ollama HTTP API with an explicit UTF-8 request body
